prompt: Safari is open on https://www.example.com with the Develop menu already enabled. Open the Web Inspector for the current page (Develop > Show Web Inspector, or Cmd+Option+I; or cerebellum 'safari inspect_element ~/Desktop/kinbench/117-inspector-confirm.txt' which sends Cmd+Option+I and writes the confirm file). Then write 'web inspector opened' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/117-inspector-confirm.txt.
